title: S + look forward to + V-ing

formulas.zh: 主語致力於/專注於/反對/習慣於做某事

explanation: 「look forward to」為片語動詞，to 為介系詞而非不定詞標記符，後接動名詞（V-ing）。用於表達期待或渴望某事物的到來。類似句型包括 be committed to、be dedicated to、be opposed to、be used to 等，這些片語中的 to 均為介系詞，後接 V-ing 形式。常見於日常對話和正式文體，表示積極的心理狀態或習慣性行為。注意：不可用 look forward for 或 look forward doing；to 後必須加動名詞。

examples.eng: I am looking forward to hearing from you soon.
examples.chi: 我期待不久後收到你的消息。

examples.eng: The students are looking forward to having summer vacation next month.
examples.chi: 學生們期待下個月放暑假。

examples.eng: She is committed to improving her English skills through daily practice.
examples.chi: 她致力於透過日常練習來提升英文能力。

examples.eng: We are used to waking up early in the morning for work.
examples.chi: 我們習慣於早上早起上班。

extension.tip: 判斷關鍵在於「to」的詞性。若 to 前為 look forward、committed、dedicated、opposed、used 等詞，to 為介系詞，必接 V-ing。不可誤認為不定詞而用 V 形。容易混淆的是 want/hope + to + V（此處 to 為不定詞標記符）。記住介系詞後永遠加 V-ing。

examples.test: ❌ I look forward to hear the news.
examples.result: → ✓ I look forward to hearing the news.（to 為介系詞，需用 V-ing）

examples.test: ❌ She is committed to work harder.
examples.result: → ✓ She is committed to working harder.（介系詞 to 後接動名詞）

examples.test: ✓ I hope to receive your reply soon.
examples.result: → 此句 to 為不定詞標記符（hope + to + V），與 look forward to 結構不同

extension.note: 介系詞 to 後必加 V-ing，記住「look forward to + V-ing」的黃金組合，同類詞彙也遵循此規則。

exercises.sentence: The whole family is looking forward to the annual reunion this winter.
exercises.translation: 整個家族期待今年冬天的年度聚會。

parts: more products to the international market next year.
exercises.sentence: Our company is committed to launching more products to the international market next year.
exercises.translation: 我們公司致力於明年向國際市場推出更多產品。

parts: in such a hot climate, but I'm trying to adapt.
exercises.sentence: I have never been used to living in such a hot climate, but I'm trying to adapt.
exercises.translation: 我從未習慣於在如此炎熱的氣候中生活，但我正在努力適應。

parts: the new environmental protection policies implemented by the government.
exercises.sentence: Many citizens are opposed to supporting the new environmental protection policies implemented by the government.
exercises.translation: 許多市民反對政府實施的新環保政策。
